channel.title: Family on SuperList.us
channel.description: Recent content in Family on SuperList.us

item.title: Holiday World & Splashin' Safari
item.description: A full-sized theme park in Santa Claus, Indiana. Roller coasters, water slides, and free unlimited soft drinks — which is a genuinely aggressive perk. The park is themed around holidays: Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, and the 4th of July. It’s been open since 1946, making it one of the oldest theme parks in the country.

item.title: Liepold Farms
item.description: A family farm in Boring, Oregon, that’s been a fall tradition for generations. Pumpkin patches, corn mazes, hayrides, apple slingshots, and a children’s pavilion. Spring and summer bring berries. Everything about this place is wholesome and the address is hilarious.
